title: Started a Discord server!
excerpt: During the hackathons, we really enjoyed connecting live in Slack with other developers and partners. Since we’ve been missing that interaction, we spun up a Discord server. Feel free to join us, say hello and stay awhil…

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
During the hackathons, we really enjoyed connecting live in Slack with other developers and partners. Since we’ve been missing that interaction, we spun up a Discord server. Feel free to join us, say hello and stay awhile.

Discord

Join the The Monday Neighborhood Discord Server!

Check out the The Monday Neighborhood community on Discord - hang out with 240 other members and enjoy free voice and text chat.

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is amazing @PolishedGeek, thank you for doing so! Great place for our dev community to connect with one another.

Just a heads up for others: this is an unofficial server that’s run by our community members. For support, please continue to utilize our main channels by posting in the community apps & devs section, as well as emailing into our appsupport@monday.com email.
